messages.content: Walk me through a campaign you executed and how you measured it.

For a product webinar, I built HubSpot emails, coordinated speaker prep, and tracked registration-to-attendance and opportunity conversion in Sheets. Attendance improved after we changed the reminder timing.
How do you evaluate whether copy worked?
I compare open and click rates, but I also look at whether the audience took the intended next action. I prefer testing one message variable at a time when volume allows.

human_notes: Supports campaign execution and basic metric reasoning.
